active_sales.name: Steam Summer Sale 2026
active_sales.note: This year's event runs June 25 - July 9, 2026 at 10am Pacific, meaning it ends in 3 days — last-chance urgency window for Steam key sales.

active_sales.name: EA Summer Sale
active_sales.note: EA's storefront summer promotion is running alongside Steam's, aligning with loot.tn's existing F1 25 and EA FC 26 discounts.

new_releases.title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag: Resynced
new_releases.why_it_matters: Major Ubisoft remake dropping the same week the Steam Summer Sale ends, showcasing improved stealth, smoother parkour, and dynamic weather.

new_releases.title: Halo: Campaign Evolved
new_releases.why_it_matters: Big remake giving Xbox/PC key sales a boost this month amid an otherwise 'quiet' July release slate.

new_releases.title: EA Sports College Football 27
new_releases.why_it_matters: Annual EA sports title launch is a reliable seasonal driver for EA key/account sales, similar to the store's existing F1 25 and EA FC 26 listings.

new_releases.title: GTA VI pre-order marketing push
new_releases.platforms: PS5, Xbox Series X/S (no PC confirmed)
new_releases.why_it_matters: Take-Two's marketing campaign and pre-orders are expected to open around this window, with the game confirmed for November 19, 2026 at roughly $79.99 — demand for pre-order listings will spike as soon as official pre-orders go live.

streamer_trends.why_it_matters: The game rocketed to #7 most-watched on Twitch and sold over 15 million copies by July 5 largely through streamer-driven virality, and it's already a loot.tn Steam key product that's currently buried in the catalog rather than featured.

streamer_trends.streamer: absi, 3mr and other Arabic-language Kick streamers
streamer_trends.why_it_matters: GTA RP has become the dominant gaming format on Arabic-language Kick, directly boosting relevance for loot.tn's existing GTA V Enhanced (PC) Rockstar key listing among the Tunisian/MENA audience.

streamer_trends.streamer: General Twitch charts (League of Legends, VALORANT, Counter-Strike)
streamer_trends.why_it_matters: These remain top-3 most-watched competitive titles on Twitch this week, sustaining steady demand for loot.tn's Valorant VP cards and supporting cross-promotion potential for LoL/Riot points.

recommendations.action: Move MECCHA CHAMELEON from a buried 'Derniers ajouts' card to a hero/banner spot with messaging like 'Le jeu que Shroud et Pokimane jouent en ce moment'.
recommendations.reason: It's a top-7 Twitch game with viral TikTok/streamer momentum, already sold on loot.tn but under-promoted relative to its current hype.

recommendations.action: Add a 'Dernières heures' countdown banner for Steam Summer Sale-tied products (Arc Raiders, Gothic 1 Remake, F1 25, GTA V Enhanced) since the sale ends July 9.
recommendations.reason: Steam Summer Sale 2026 runs June 25 - July 9, 2026, creating urgency for last-minute key purchases before the sale ends in 3 days.

recommendations.action: Create a GTA VI pre-order landing page/teaser with waitlist signup and clarify PS5 vs Xbox editions, since Rockstar's marketing push and possible pre-order opening is imminent.
recommendations.reason: GTA 6 launches November 19, 2026 with marketing expected to ramp up this summer, and loot.tn already lists PRE-ORDER SKUs that could benefit from a dedicated hype page.

recommendations.action: Bundle GTA V Enhanced (PC) key with GTA Online / Shark Cards messaging targeted at Tunisian Kick/roleplay audiences.
recommendations.reason: GTA RP has become the dominant gaming format on Arabic-language Kick streams, indicating strong regional appetite for GTA-related products.

recommendations.action: Run a Valorant VP top-up promo/bundle (e.g., discount on 2000+3 VP tier) tied to esports/competitive Twitch trends.
recommendations.reason: VALORANT remains a top-5 most-watched Twitch category, sustaining consistent demand for in-game currency top-ups loot.tn already sells.

recommendations.action: Add an EA Sports College Football 27 pre-release teaser card alongside existing EA FC 26 promos.
recommendations.reason: The new EA Sports College Football 27 title is releasing in July 2026, giving EA account/key cross-sell opportunity similar to current EA FC 26 listings.

site_notes: loot.tn's homepage already carries strong SKUs (MECCHA CHAMELEON, Arc Raiders, EA FC 26, GTA V Enhanced, GTA VI pre-orders) that map directly onto this week's real trends, but placement/hierarchy doesn't reflect current hype — MECCHA CHAMELEON in particular deserves hero placement given its top-7 Twitch ranking and viral streamer traction, and a Steam Summer Sale countdown banner should be added before the sale ends July 9.
